parameters.query: SELECT phase_id, output_json FROM nets_phase_outputs WHERE lesson_id='{{ $json.lesson_id }}' ORDER BY CASE phase_id WHEN 'phase_0a' THEN 1 WHEN 'phase_0b' THEN 2 WHEN 'phase_1' THEN 3 WHEN 'phase_2' THEN 4 WHEN 'phase_3' THEN 5 WHEN 'phase_4' THEN 6 WHEN 'phase_5' THEN 7 WHEN 'phase_6' THEN 8 WHEN 'phase_7' THEN 9 END
UPDATE nets_task_queue SET status='done', updated_at=now() WHERE task_id='{{ $json.task_id }}'
INSERT INTO nets_session_log (task_id, stage, event, payload) VALUES ('{{ $json.task_id }}', 'assemble', 'success', '{"md_path": "{{ $json.md_path }}"}'::jsonb)
